prompt: Add random jitter noise to low-gradient areas to simulate texture, while keeping high-gradient edges clean.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (the flower) by adding random jitter noise. Apply this noise exclusively to the low-gradient areas, which correspond to the darker regions identified in reference image 2. Ensure that the high-gradient edges, represented by the brighter lines in image 2, remain sharp and clean. The purpose of this edit is to simulate a subtle texture within the smooth areas of the image.
objects: Subtle texture on the smoother areas of the petals
Sharp edges on the flower petals
Sharp details on the flower center
